optionName: Nvidia GeForce RTX 2060 Super Founders Edition
detailedDescription:
An upgraded 2060 with more cores and 8GB VRAM.
Bridges the gap between the 2060 and 2070 at a competitive price.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: TU106 | Architecture: Turing
CUDA Cores: 2176 | RT Cores: 34 | Tensor Cores: 272
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.0, 1x USB-C (VirtualLink)
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 3.0)
Recommended PSU: 550W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
